summary: Complete testing of P3 Cameras RTSP/ONVIF feature. Backend: 18/18 tests pass after fixing route ordering bug. Frontend: All features working correctly.

fixed_issues.issue: Route ordering bug - static routes like /settings/snapshot, /discover/onvif were defined AFTER dynamic /{camera_id} route, causing FastAPI to match 'settings' as a camera_id
fixed_issues.fix: Reorganized routes to place all static paths (/settings/snapshot, /discover/onvif, /cleanup/snapshots, /test-url, /hls/) BEFORE the dynamic /{camera_id} route
fixed_issues.impact: GET /api/cameras/settings/snapshot was returning 520 error with 'settings is not a valid ObjectId'

console_warnings.impact: Pre-existing issue, not related to P3 Cameras feature

console_warnings.warning: Error loading users: authAPI.getUsers is not a function
console_warnings.impact: Pre-existing issue in Settings dialog, not related to P3 Cameras feature

critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering bug fixed in camera_routes.py - static routes must come before dynamic routes in FastAPI
All 18 backend API tests pass including CRUD, settings, ONVIF discovery, streaming, and validation
Frontend cameras page loads correctly with grid view, live streaming panel, and all action buttons
updated_files: /app/backend/camera_routes.py - Fixed route ordering (static routes before dynamic routes)
/app/backend/tests/test_cameras.py - New comprehensive test file for cameras API
seed_data_creation: 3 test cameras exist (Caméra Test Atelier, Entrée Principale, Zone Stockage) with fictitious IPs - all show as offline as expected
context_for_next_testing_agent: P3 Cameras RTSP/ONVIF feature is fully functional. Route ordering bug was fixed. Test cameras have fictitious IPs so they show as offline - this is expected behavior.

cameras_page_loads.test: Page /cameras loads with grid view and Live tab
cameras_page_loads.evidence: Page loads with title 'Caméras', subtitle 'Surveillance vidéo RTSP/ONVIF', tabs for Vignettes and Live

cameras_list_api.evidence: Returns list of cameras with id, name, rtsp_url, is_online, brand, location

cameras_create_api.evidence: Creates camera with all fields, validates required fields (name, rtsp_url)

cameras_delete_api.evidence: Deletes camera and returns 404 on subsequent GET

cameras_count_api.evidence: Returns total, online, offline counts and active_streams/max_streams (3)

cameras_test_connection_api.evidence: Tests RTSP connection and updates is_online status

cameras_snapshot_api.evidence: Returns success/failure with snapshot base64 or error message

cameras_stream_start_api.evidence: Returns stream_url and active_streams count, respects max 3 streams limit

cameras_stream_stop_api.evidence: Stops stream and returns updated active_streams count

cameras_onvif_discovery_api.evidence: Returns count and list of discovered cameras (empty in test environment)

cameras_settings_update_api.evidence: Updates settings and returns new values

cameras_grid_display.test: Camera grid displays thumbnails with status badges
cameras_grid_display.evidence: 3 test cameras displayed with 'Hors ligne' badges, loading spinners for thumbnails

cameras_add_dialog.test: Add camera dialog with form validation
cameras_add_dialog.evidence: Dialog opens with all fields: Nom, URL RTSP, Utilisateur, Mot de passe, Marque, Emplacement, Test button

cameras_sidebar_menu.evidence: Caméras menu visible in sidebar navigation

cameras_live_panel.evidence: Live tab shows 'Visualisation Live' with 3 slots for simultaneous streaming

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/cameras_full_test_01.png - Main cameras page with grid view
